meta.pricingNote: This official agreement does not include pricing. Sophia is billed as a monthly subscription — verify current pricing at sophia.org before budgeting (default used by the calculator is editable in Settings).
meta.dataNote: SOURCE: WGU Transfer Pathways Agreement, Sophia Learning LLC — Bachelor of Arts, Elementary Education (Catalog 03-2026), generated 7/3/2026 (uniqueId BAELED7113, official document provided by the user). Every course below is DIRECTLY from that agreement — nothing here is guessed. Several WGU requirements accept any ONE of several alternative Sophia courses; all listed alternatives are shown, but only one needs to be completed per requirement.
keyRules: Once you start your initial term at WGU, transfer credit will no longer be accepted — complete every Sophia course you plan to use BEFORE enrolling.
A transfer course may not be used to fulfill more than one WGU requirement.
Students must complete at least 25% of the degree's 120 competency units (30 CUs) through WGU residency — transfer/prior learning combined cannot exceed 75% of the degree.
This agreement's confirmed maximum transfer is 26 of 120 CUs (about 22% of the degree) — the other 94 CUs must be completed at WGU regardless of outside coursework.
This evaluation was generated 7/3/2026 and is 'not guaranteed in perpetuity' — if enrollment is more than 30 days out, confirm with your Enrollment Counselor that policy hasn't changed.

statusLegend.pathway: Confirmed on official Transfer Pathway Agreement

courses.name: English Composition (ENG1001)
courses.notes: Official code: ENG1001 (SOPH-0015). Confirm the exact course title in your Sophia dashboard using this code — Sophia's public catalog names may differ slightly from the internal codes on the agreement.
courses.tips: Confirmed transfer — no need to verify further, just complete it before enrolling at WGU.

courses.name: Communication course (choose ONE: COMM1002, COMM1010, or BUSI1025)
courses.wguEquivalent: Introduction to Communication: Connecting with Others
courses.notes: Official codes (any ONE satisfies this requirement): COMM1002 (SOPH-0024), COMM1010 (SOPH-0034), or BUSI1025 (SOPH-0059). Only complete one — the others would be wasted spend.
courses.tips: Pick whichever of the three is fastest/cheapest in your Sophia catalog; all three are pre-confirmed equivalents.

courses.name: Composition course (choose ONE: ENG1002 or ENG1020)
courses.notes: Official codes (any ONE satisfies this requirement): ENG1002 (SOPH-0030) or ENG1020 (SOPH-0049). Only complete one.
courses.tips: Confirmed transfer for this WGU performance-assessment writing course — a strong candidate to finish early.

courses.name: Physical science course (choose ONE: SCIE1005, CHEM1001, or SCIE1060)
courses.notes: Official codes (any ONE satisfies this requirement): SCIE1005 (SOPH-0016), CHEM1001 (SOPH-0056), or SCIE1060 (SOPH-0095). Only complete one.
courses.tips: Compare the three options in your Sophia dashboard for pacing/topic fit before choosing.

courses.name: Math course (choose ONE: MATH1001, MATH1035, or MATH1040)
courses.notes: Official codes (any ONE satisfies this requirement): MATH 1001 (SOPH-0001), MATH 1035 (SOPH-0069), or MATH 1040 (SOPH-0060). Only complete one.
courses.tips: This is separate from the Elementary Mathematics content courses, which must be completed at WGU regardless.

courses.name: Statistics (STAT1001)
courses.tips: Confirmed transfer — a good candidate for early completion.

courses.name: Biology course (choose ONE: SCIE1020, SCIE1050, SCIE1045, or SCIE1055)
courses.notes: Official codes (any ONE satisfies this requirement): SCIE1020 (SOPH-0002), SCIE1050 (SOPH-0073), SCIE1045 (SOPH-0074), or SCIE1055 (SOPH-0081). Only complete one.
courses.tips: Four alternatives gives flexibility — pick whichever fits her schedule/interest best.

courses.name: Science lab course (choose ONE: SCIE1021, SCIE1031, SCIE1051, SCIE1046, or SCIE1056)
courses.notes: Official codes (any ONE satisfies this requirement): SCIE1021 (SOPH-0067), SCIE1031 (SOPH-0070), SCIE1051 (SOPH-0072), SCIE1046 (SOPH-0075), or SCIE1056 (SOPH-0082). Only complete one.
courses.tips: Smallest requirement on the agreement (2 CUs) — pairs well with the matching Biology or Physical Science course above.

courses.name: US History/Government (HIST1020)
courses.wguEquivalent: American Politics and the US Constitution
courses.tips: Confirmed transfer — no proctored WGU exam to worry about if completed here first.
